description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 24 hrs 29 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 44 mins per day. His WakaTime activity was spread across 6 projects and was mainly in Other (44%), Java (39%), and Markdown (13%). There were no GitHub commits, opened pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
